title: The Christ
content:
The good intent of God became the Christ.
    And lived on earth--the Living Love of God,
    That men might draw to closer touch with heaven,
    Since Christ in all the ways of man hath trod.
meaning:
"The Christ" is a quintessential example of William Arthur Dunkerley (John Oxenham)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
